title: potentilla flabellifolia var. hirta
intro: Potentilla flabellifolia var. hirta, also known as hairy cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla flabellifolia var. hirta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. This plant can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has also been used in folk medicine to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
